blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 9 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
